summary: Tested backend and frontend for INR payments, landing hamburger/about/contact pages, safety GPS controls, city autocomplete, ride-post validations, and saved driver defaults. Backend feature regression passed fully; frontend has one critical runtime error in Safety share fallback and one minor testability selector issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Share my location' can trigger uncaught runtime error overlay when clipboard permission is denied (writeText throws NotAllowedError)

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard fallback is not guarded by try/catch; permission denial breaks page with runtime overlay instead of graceful toast handling.

issues: Container test id 'contact-number-list' shares the same prefix as link items ('contact-number-*'), causing ambiguous selector matches in automation.

action_items: Wrap clipboard fallback in SafetyPage.shareLocation() with try/catch and show toast on permission denial (avoid uncaught runtime error overlay).
Adjust Contact page data-testid naming to avoid prefix collision between list container and individual phone links.
Optionally enforce valid city selection from India city list to prevent partial/free-text city persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: SafetyPage uses navigator.clipboard.writeText without error handling; this is unstable in restricted permission environments.
CityAutocompleteInput uses datalist with free text acceptance; backend ride creation currently allows partial/non-canonical city values (e.g., 'Luck', 'Kan') to persist.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary users via /api/auth/register during tests: ui_feature_0329070609@example.com, plus backend pytest-generated TEST_FeatureDriver/TEST_FeatureRider accounts and related rides/requests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression for requested features is green (5/5). Frontend critical bug reproducible on Safety page by clicking share location in environments without clipboard write permission. Verify fix by re-running safety flow and ensuring no runtime overlay appears.
rca of the issue: RCA: Safety share fallback assumes clipboard write permission and awaits navigator.clipboard.writeText(message) without guard. In browser contexts where clipboard permission is denied, a NotAllowedError is thrown and surfaces as uncaught runtime error. Repro: login -> /safety -> capture GPS -> click share button in restricted clipboard environment. Mitigation: add try/catch around clipboard write and toast fallback messaging; optionally pre-check permissions API where available.
